inputs.label: ∂Fz/∂y
inputs.businessContext: Partial derivative of the z-component of the vector field with respect to y

businessContext_i18n.en: Partial derivative of the z-component of the vector field with respect to y
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vektör alanının z bileşeninin y'ye göre kısmi türevi
businessContext_i18n.de: Partielle Ableitung der z-Komponente des Vektorfeldes nach y
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dérivée partielle de la composante z du champ vectoriel par rapport à y
businessContext_i18n.es: Derivada parcial de la componente z del campo vectorial con respecto a y
businessContext_i18n.ar: المشتق الجزئي للمركبة z من حقل المتجه بالنسبة إلى y
